title: The Depths of Impel Down: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why is there so much space!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This space wasn't always here, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If I cut down this trash...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Friendship has nothing to do with that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah, straw-chan came here to save him.
